v2_sources.title: Zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 in patients with claudin-18.2 positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (SPOTLIGHT): a randomised, double-blind, phase 3 trial - Supplementary appendix
v2_sources.citation: Zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 in patients with claudin-18.2 positive, human epidermal growth factor receptor 2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma (SPOTLIGHT): a randomised, double-blind, phase 3 trial - Supplementary appendix. The Lancet. 2023.

boundary_tags.population_or_model: Patients with claudin-18.2 positive, HER2-negative, untreated, locally advanced unresectable or metastatic gastric or gastro-oesophageal junction adenocarcinoma

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Progression-free survival: Median PFS was 10.61 months (95% CI 8.90-12.48) in zolbetuximab group vs 8.67 months (95% CI 8.21-10.28) in placebo group. Hazard ratio 0.751 (95% CI 0.598-0.94
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Progression-free survival: Median PFS was 10.61 months (95% CI 8.90-12.48) in zolbetuximab group vs 8.67 months (95% CI 8.21-10.28) in placebo group. Hazard ratio 0.751 (95% CI 0.598-0.94

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Overall survival (key secondary endpoint): Median OS was 18.23 months (95% CI 16.43-22.90) in zolbetuximab group vs 15.54 months (95% CI 13.47-16.53) in placebo group. Hazard ratio 0.750
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Overall survival (key secondary endpoint): Median OS was 18.23 months (95% CI 16.43-22.90) in zolbetuximab group vs 15.54 months (95% CI 13.47-16.53) in placebo group. Hazard ratio 0.750

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Objective response rate was similar between groups: 48% (135/283) in zolbetuximab group vs 48% (134/282) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Objective response rate was similar between groups: 48% (135/283) in zolbetuximab group vs 48% (134/282) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Complete response rate was higher in zolbetuximab group: 7% (19/283) vs 4% (10/282) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Complete response rate was higher in zolbetuximab group: 7% (19/283) vs 4% (10/282) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Median duration of response was 9.00 months (95% CI 6.87-10.25) in zolbetuximab group vs 8.05 months (95% CI 6.47-10.81) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Median duration of response was 9.00 months (95% CI 6.87-10.25) in zolbetuximab group vs 8.05 months (95% CI 6.47-10.81) in placebo group.', 'page': 8}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Treatment-related grade 5 events leading to death occurred in 5 patients (2%) in zolbetuximab group vs 4 patients (1%) in placebo group.', 'page': 16}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Treatment-related grade 5 events leading to death occurred in 5 patients (2%) in zolbetuximab group vs 4 patients (1%) in placebo group.', 'page': 16}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Nausea was the most common adverse event in zolbetuximab group: 81% (226/279) vs 61% (169/278) in placebo group.', 'page': 13}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Nausea was the most common adverse event in zolbetuximab group: 81% (226/279) vs 61% (169/278) in placebo group.', 'page': 13}

v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Vomiting occurred in 65% (180/279) of patients in zolbetuximab group vs 35% (96/278) in placebo group.', 'page': 13}
v2_facts.definition_zh: {'content': 'Vomiting occurred in 65% (180/279) of patients in zolbetuximab group vs 35% (96/278) in placebo group.', 'page': 13}
